rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple load-bearing inconsistencies and proposes thorough repairs, demonstrating end-to-end engagement with the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly flags uncertainty for several claims and provides confidence markers for recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adheres to scope with minor drifts in focus.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors introduced; identifies harmful patterns in original content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack traceability.
